title: Verify 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' on Pause pop-up
description: Test that clicking the primary action on the Pause pop-up dismisses it and enables the reminder toggle.
preconditions: The 'Loss Aversion' pop-up for pausing is displayed

steps.description: 1. In the pop-up, click the 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' button

expected_result: The pop-up closes, the user remains on the Trial Corner screen, the trial remains active, and the 'Remind me' toggle is now enabled.
